reminders.title: Eye break
reminders.body: Look away from the screen and focus on a distant object for 20 seconds.
reminders.safety_note: This is general visual hygiene guidance, not medical advice. Persistent eye symptoms should be assessed by an eye-care professional.

reminders.title: Posture reset
reminders.body: Relax your shoulders. Keep your head level, wrists straight, elbows close, and both feet fully supported.
reminders.safety_note: Do not force a position that causes pain. Adjust workstation equipment where possible.

reminders.title: Move for a minute
reminders.body: Stand up, walk gently, and loosen your hips and back before returning to work.
reminders.safety_note: Move within your safe range and workplace rules.
